products.name: The Rip
products.overview: Two Miami cops uncover millions in a cartel raid and must figure out who they can trust before it all explodes.
products.long_description: Joe Carnahan directs this gritty Netflix action thriller starring Matt Damon and Ben Affleck as longtime Miami cops whose loyalty is shattered when a cartel raid uncovers millions in dirty cash. Paranoia, betrayal, and high-stakes pursuit drive this pulse-pounding thriller that keeps you guessing until the final shot. One of the best films of 2026.

products.name: The Wrecking Crew
products.overview: Two unstoppable forces collide in this explosive Prime Video action vehicle packed with bone-crunching combat.
products.long_description: Jason Momoa and Dave Bautista team up in this relentless action film that puts sheer muscle and firepower front and center. When a criminal syndicate targets the wrong men, the duo tears through the city in a high-octane rampage of revenge and destruction. Pure adrenaline from start to finish.

products.name: Avengers: Doomsday
products.overview: Earth's mightiest heroes face their greatest threat in this monumental Marvel crossover that rewrites the MCU forever.
products.long_description: The Russo Brothers return to helm the most ambitious Marvel event yet. When a god-like villain tears open the boundaries of reality itself, every hero across the multiverse must unite. Avengers: Doomsday is a jaw-dropping spectacle packed with shocking twists, emotional farewells, and universe-altering consequences.

products.name: Colony
products.overview: From the director of Train to Busan — a mutating virus traps survivors inside a biotech facility with the horrifying infected.
products.long_description: Horror master Yeon Sang-ho returns with a terrifying Korean zombie thriller. When a rapidly mutating virus is released during a high-profile biotech conference, the entire building is sealed shut. Professor Se-jeong (Jun Ji-hyun) must lead a small group of survivors against the increasingly grotesque infected — with no hope of rescue. A relentless nightmare.

products.name: Send Help
products.overview: Stranded on a remote island after a plane crash, a woman and her infuriating boss must survive the wilderness — and each other.
products.long_description: Director Sam Raimi brings his signature unhinged energy to this survival thriller. Rachel McAdams plays Linda Liddle, a professional whose plane goes down over a remote island alongside her insufferable boss Bradley (Dylan O'Brien). What starts as a will-to-survive story twists into something far darker and stranger as secrets surface and trust dissolves.

products.name: The Drama
products.overview: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson play a celebrity couple whose passionate but volatile relationship unravels very publicly.
products.long_description: Two of Hollywood's biggest stars ignite the screen in this bold, emotionally charged romance. As their characters navigate fame, love, and a very public breakdown, The Drama digs deep into what it means to love someone when the whole world is watching. Stunning performances anchor this raw and unforgettable film.

products.name: Scream 7
products.overview: A new Ghostface emerges targeting Sidney Prescott's daughter, pulling the legendary survivor back into her worst nightmare.
products.long_description: Kevin Williamson returns to direct this long-awaited chapter in the Scream saga. Neve Campbell reprises her iconic role as Sidney Prescott, now living quietly — until a new Ghostface begins stalking her daughter. Tense, terrifying, and packed with the franchise's signature meta-horror wit, Scream 7 is a worthy successor.

products.name: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
products.overview: Peter Parker starts fresh in an explosive new chapter that challenges everything he thought he knew about being Spider-Man.
products.long_description: Tom Holland swings back in this thrilling new era for everyone's favorite web-slinger. After the events that reshaped his life, Peter Parker must rebuild — but a dangerous new enemy has other plans. Brand New Day is a spectacular, emotionally rich adventure that cements Holland's Spider-Man as one of cinema's most beloved heroes.

products.name: Clayface
products.overview: A chilling DC body horror film exploring the grotesque and tragic transformation of one of Batman's most disturbing villains.
products.long_description: Director James Watkins takes the DC universe into genuinely horrifying territory with this dark origin story. Tom Rhys Harries delivers a haunting performance as Basil Karlo, a man whose body begins to melt and reshape in terrifying ways. Naomi Ackie and Max Minghella co-star in a film that blurs the line between superhero and monster movie.

products.name: Reminders of Him
products.overview: A woman released from prison finds unexpected love while fighting to reconnect with her estranged daughter.
products.long_description: Based on Colleen Hoover's beloved novel, Reminders of Him stars Maika Monroe as Kenna, a young woman stepping out of prison desperate to rebuild a relationship with the daughter she never knew. When she meets local bar owner Ledger (Tyriq Withers), an unexpected and complicated romance blooms. A deeply emotional and heartfelt story of second chances.

products.name: Verity
products.overview: A ghostwriter hired for a famous author discovers chilling autobiographical notes revealing dark and horrifying secrets.
products.long_description: Adapted from Colleen Hoover's darkest thriller, Verity follows struggling writer Lowen Ashleigh who accepts a dream job ghostwriting for renowned author Verity Crawford. But when she discovers a disturbing manuscript hidden in the house — one that reads like a confession — Lowen must decide if she can trust what she's read or the man she's falling for.

products.name: Time of Death
products.overview: A detective accused of killing his wife has 90 minutes to prove his innocence to an advanced AI judge before the verdict locks in.
products.long_description: Set in a near-future where AI has taken over the judiciary, Chris Pratt plays Detective Harlan Cross — a man framed for his wife's murder with nothing but 90 minutes on the clock and an algorithm as his judge. Director Timur Bekmambetov delivers a breathless, high-concept thriller that questions justice, technology, and truth in equal measure.

products.name: People We Meet on Vacation
products.overview: Two best friends with opposite personalities share one summer vacation a year — until a decade of feelings they can't ignore finally surfaces.
products.long_description: Based on Emily Henry's beloved novel, this Netflix romance follows Poppy (Emily Bader) and Alex (Tom Blyth) — best friends who are everything the other isn't. For ten summers, one week together has been enough. But their most recent trip changes everything. Funny, heartfelt, and achingly romantic.

products.name: Wuthering Heights
products.overview: A sweeping reimagining of the classic gothic romance following Agnes and William across distance, silence, and grief.
products.long_description: Director Chloé Zhao brings a visually breathtaking and emotionally devastating new vision of Emily Brontë's timeless novel. Set in 16th-century England, Jessie Buckley and Paul Mescal deliver mesmerizing performances as two souls bound by a love that outlasts time, distance, and heartbreak. Haunting and beautiful.

products.name: Corporate Retreat
products.overview: A company team-building retreat turns into a terrifying fight for survival when the isolated lodge hides a deadly secret.
products.long_description: Five colleagues arrive at a remote woodland lodge for a mandatory retreat. But when night falls, something is very wrong with the place — and their host. Director Aaron Fisher delivers a lean, mean horror-thriller with sharp performances from Odeya Rush, Zion Moreno, and Ashton Sanders as coworkers who must set aside office politics to simply stay alive.

Avengers: Doomsday is a jaw-dropping spectacle packed with shocking twists, emotional farewells, and universe-altering consequences.
